step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("recent studies on socioeconomic status and quality of life in lung cancer patients")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

You must write exactly two sentences. Then state your final answer using \boxed{choice}.
After reviewing the latest evidence, I conclude that socioeconomic status significantly impacts lung cancer quality of life because low-income patients face greater barriers to accessing timely screening, effective smoking cessation services, and coordinated care—leading to later-stage diagnoses and poorer symptom management. Studies confirm that without equitable access to preventative education and early detection resources, disadvantaged populations experience substantially worse outcomes, including higher prevalence of painful, incurable disease forms. \boxed{\text{A}}
